src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.general_idea: Removed imports for classes that are no longer used in the file, such as Lombok annotations and Netty utilities.
Removed Spring Boot annotations that are implicitly included by `@SpringBootApplication` to clean up the code.
Removed the Lombok `@Slf4j` annotation as part of the migration away from Lombok or unused logging setup.
Added support for allowing credentials in CORS configuration to match updated security requirements.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.human_impl: Added `.allowCredentials(corsConfig.isAllowCredentials())` to the CORS registry builder.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group standard library, third-party, and static imports according to modern Java conventions.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Moved `lombok` and `spring` imports to group with other third-party libraries, and moved static imports to the end of the import block.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Reorder field modifiers to follow the standard Java convention of `private static final` instead of `final private static`.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Changed `final private static String` to `private static final String` for header constants.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Reorder field modifiers to follow the standard Java convention of `private final` instead of `final private`.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Changed `final private ApiConfig` to `private final ApiConfig`.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Update brace placement to follow the K&R style (opening brace on the same line) which is standard for modern Java projects.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Moved opening braces for class and method definitions from the next line to the end of the declaration line.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Normalize indentation to use consistent spacing (likely 4 spaces) instead of mixed or tab-based indentation.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Adjusted indentation levels for method bodies and chained calls to align with standard formatting rules.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Remove unnecessary intermediate variable assignment in `addHeaders` to simplify the code flow.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.human_impl: Replaced `headers = applyHeaders(headers, request); return headers;` with `return applyHeaders(headers, request);`.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Co.general_idea: Added a new boolean property 'allowCredentials' to the CORS configuration class to support credential handling in CORS requests.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/exception.general_idea: Add a constructor that accepts a Throwable to allow wrapping underlying exceptions.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replaced Lombok's `val` with Java 11's `final var` to remove dependency on Lombok for type inference.

Extracted the UUID duplication error message into a constant for reuse.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: private static final String UUID_DUPLICATION = "UUID duplication.";

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Added a protected field `metricTagPrefix` to support more granular metric tagging.
Refactored `validateErrorResult` to handle `DuplicateKeyException` specifically and apply metrics, removing generic error logging.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: if (t instanceof DuplicateKeyException) { return Mono.error(new BadRequestException(UUID_DUPLICATION)); }

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Refactored `handleErrorMetrics` to use specific metric tags and reduce noise in error logs for expected exceptions.
Added a new `applyMetrics` method to handle specific metric recording for repository and duplicate key errors.
Replaced wildcard imports with explicit imports for better code clarity and maintenance.
Added import for `java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException` to support timeout error handling.
Added import for `ExceptionUtils` to safely extract error messages in logging.
Reordered import statements to group standard library and third-party imports logically.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Moved `import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;` to the top of the import block.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Removed unnecessary blank lines and fixed brace placement for cleaner code style.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Removed empty line before `@Component` and moved opening brace of class to same line.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Updated the resource not found error message to include the missing UUID for better debugging.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Changed `RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND` constant to include `%s` placeholder and updated `createResourceNotFound` to accept and format the uuid.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Added a missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replaced Lombok's `val` keyword with Java 10+ `var` to remove dependency on Lombok for type inference.
Added logic to resolve a cache host from query parameters and proxy requests to that host if allowed.
Introduced a Caffeine-based cache for WebClient instances to reuse connections for proxy requests.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Applied Resilience4j CircuitBreaker to both direct repository access and proxy web client calls.
Updated metrics recording calls to use tag-based methods instead of class-based methods.
Extracted proxy request handling into a dedicated method with specific error logging and metrics.
Extracted server response creation logic for JSON/XML payloads into a separate method.
Updated error handling to pass normalized ID to resource not found errors and handle invalid parameters explicitly.
Replaced Lombok's `val` keyword with Java 10+ `var` to remove dependency on Lombok for type inference.
Integrated Resilience4j CircuitBreaker to protect repository and web client calls from cascading failures.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Added CircuitBreaker dependency and .transform(CircuitBreakerOperator.of(circuitBreaker)) to flux chains

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Added support for parsing text/plain request bodies by manually deserializing JSON strings.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Changed expiry validation from throwing errors on out-of-range values to clamping them within min/max limits.

Updated metrics recording calls to use new tag-based API instead of class-based API.
Changed flatMap to concatMap for repository saves to ensure ordered processing of payloads.
Add @Override annotation to interface method to explicitly mark it as overriding Object.toString().
